notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw lines out to center fielder Evan Carter.

notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez grounds out to first baseman Justin Foscue. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd. Justin Foscue out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd. Justin Foscue out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd. Kyle Higashioka out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Corey Seager GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a soft ground ball to catcher Kyle Higashioka. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd. Seiya Suzuki advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka.
